q: Where can you enjoy beautiful views where you live?
examiner_note: Giám khảo muốn bạn mô tả một địa điểm cụ thể và lý do tại sao nó đẹp. Hãy sử dụng các tính từ mô tả mạnh mẽ (vivid adjectives) thay vì chỉ dùng 'beautiful' hay 'nice'. Bạn có thể nói về một công viên, một bờ sông, hoặc thậm chí là góc nhìn từ một quán cà phê trên cao. Các cụm từ như 'panoramic view', 'picturesque', 'hustle and bustle' sẽ rất hiệu quả.

band7.text: Where I live, there are some stunning views along the riverside. I often go there in the evening to watch the sunset, and the way the city lights reflect on the water is truly mesmerizing. It's a great place to escape from the noise of the city.
band7.note: Cung cấp địa điểm cụ thể (riverside) và mô tả chi tiết (city lights reflect). Sử dụng từ vựng tốt (stunning, mesmerizing).

band8.text: I’m fortunate to live in an area with diverse scenery. One of my favorite spots is a rooftop cafe in the city center that offers a breathtaking panoramic view of the skyline. It’s particularly captivating during the 'golden hour' when the entire city is bathed in a warm, orange glow. It’s the perfect place to unwind and take in the beauty of the urban landscape.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao (diverse scenery, breathtaking panoramic view, captivating, golden hour). Cách diễn đạt mang tính hình ảnh cao.

band9.text: Living in a coastal city, I’m spoiled for choice when it comes to scenic vistas. However, the most unparalleled view is from a lookout point on a nearby hill. From there, you can witness the majestic meeting of the azure ocean and the rugged coastline. The serenity of the location, combined with the sheer scale of the horizon, is absolutely awe-inspiring. It provides a profound sense of tranquility that is hard to find amidst the typical urban sprawl.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (spoiled for choice, scenic vistas, unparalleled, azure, rugged coastline, serenity, awe-inspiring, urban sprawl). Cách lập luận và mô tả rất tinh tế.

v.example: The hotel balcony offers a stunning scenic vista of the valley.
The mountain peak provides an unparalleled view of the sunrise.

v.meaning: xanh ngọc/xanh da trời trong vắt
v.example: The azure waters of the Mediterranean are famous worldwide.
Ireland is known for its beautiful and rugged coastline.

v.meaning: đầy cảm hứng/khiến người ta phải kinh ngạc
v.example: The Grand Canyon is one of the most awe-inspiring sights on Earth.

v.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường mang nghĩa tiêu cực)
v.example: The park provides a rare green space amidst the urban sprawl.

v.meaning: có quá nhiều lựa chọn tốt
v.example: In this city, you are spoiled for choice when it comes to good restaurants.
The Observation Deck gives you a 360-degree panoramic view of London.

v.meaning: đường chân trời/hình dáng thành phố phía xa
v.example: The New York City skyline is recognizable all over the world.

v.meaning: giờ vàng (lúc hoàng hôn hoặc bình minh)
v.example: Photographers love shooting during the golden hour for the soft light.
The valley was bathed in the soft glow of the morning sun.
The movement of the waves was absolutely mesmerizing.
The village is small but very picturesque.
The bright red flowers caught my eye immediately.
The view from the top of the waterfall was breathtaking.
She looked absolutely stunning in her wedding dress.
I love the tranquility of the countryside.

v.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
v.example: I need a break from the hustle and bustle of city life.
The Eiffel Tower is the most famous landmark in Paris.
The market is constant, vibrant and full of energy.
The English countryside is famous for its rolling hills.
In autumn, the foliage turns into brilliant shades of red and gold.
The tropical island is covered in lush vegetation.
The lake water is crystal clear, you can see the fish at the bottom.
The mist-covered mountains looked very mysterious.

v.meaning: còn nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
v.example: This part of the coast is still largely unspoilt by tourism.
We found a secluded beach where we were completely alone.
The fireworks display was truly spectacular.
The majestic peaks of the Himalayas are a sight to behold.
The reflection of the moon on the water was beautiful.
Floodlights illuminate the stadium at night.
She has a very serene expression on her face.
The bustling streets of Tokyo are amazing to see.
The city features many contemporary buildings.
Rome is famous for its ancient ruins.
New York is a huge metropolitan area.
Our hotel room overlooks the ocean.
The golden sands stretch out for miles.
The hillside was dotted with colorful wild flowers.

v.meaning: nằm gọn trong/được bao bọc bởi
v.example: The village is nestled in a quiet valley.

v.meaning: bữa tiệc cho đôi mắt (cảnh rất đẹp)
v.example: The autumn colours in New England are a feast for the eyes.

v.meaning: ở nơi hẻo lánh (không bóng người)
v.example: The cabin was located in the middle of nowhere.

v.meaning: tầm nhìn từ trên cao xuống
v.example: From the helicopter, we had a bird's eye view of the city.
We sat on the bench for an hour just taking in the view.

v.meaning: đáng để leo lên (vì cảnh đẹp)
v.example: The path was steep, but the view from the top was worth the climb.

v.meaning: tuyệt vời (như không thuộc về thế giới này)
v.example: The sunset in Santorini is simply out of this world.
Feast your eyes on this magnificent landscape!

v.meaning: đẹp như một tấm bưu thiếp
v.example: The snowy mountains looked just like a postcard.
The modern architecture of the museum is very eye-catching.
The palace stood in magnificent gardens.
